LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DONNY KWOK LUNG AO IEONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED, PURSUANT TO CCP 473(B). DEFENDANT MOVED WITHIN 3 MONTHS TO SET ASIDE THE DEFAULT, AND THERE IS NO SHOWING THAT PLAINTIFF WILL SUFFER ANY PREJUDICE IF THE RELIEF IS GRANTED. THERE HAS BEEN NO DISCOVERY CONDUCTED IN THE CASE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DONNY KWOK LUNG AO IEONG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TP AMEMD IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 22, 2013 TO GIVE MR. CHUCK THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MR. CHUCK MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 21, 2012 AT 4 PM, OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED. *COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED COURTESY COPIES OF OPPOSITION TO THE COURT.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kelton Burgess, Esq. of KB & Associates, Tel. 415.793.8080, for defendant and moving party;
Robert O. Whyte, Esq. of the Law Offices of Robert O. Whyte, Tel. 650.943.2442, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. After argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DONNY KWOK LUNG AO IEONG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted, pursuant to CCP 473(b). Defendant moved within 3 months to set aside the default, and there is no showing that plaintiff will suffer any prejudice if the relief is granted. There has been no discovery conducted in the case. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
